hero.lead: I build modern, responsive interfaces with React & Next.js — turning designs into fast, accessible products. Around two years shipping real work, from crypto dashboards to e-commerce flows.

crypto.name: Crypto Tracker
crypto.desc: Real-time cryptocurrency dashboard pulling live prices from a public API, with pagination, loading states and smooth animated transitions.

shop.name: Shop — E-commerce
shop.desc: Product catalogue with detail views and a full cart flow. State handled with Context API, data fetched over REST.

timeline.desc: Built modern, scalable interfaces with React.js and Next.js. Developed reusable components, optimised performance and integrated APIs alongside the backend team.
Shipped dynamic dashboards and admin panels with Laravel Livewire, Alpine.js and Filament. Built responsive UIs with Tailwind in a production environment.
Intensive self-directed front-end track focused on React and modern JavaScript.
